description: Keep those tiny toes warm with these deluxe baby socks! Crafted with the softest, fluffiest knitted fabric, these supersoft socks will keep baby's feet cosy — featuring grippers to keep them snugly in place while they explore. Oh-so-cute stripes, spots, and heart patterns in pastel pinks and lilacs complete the perfect look. So sweet, you won't want to take them off! 4 pairs of high quality cosy socks for babies and toddlers. These socks are OEKO-TEX certified as free from harmful substances – ideal for your baby’s delicate skin. These cute gripper socks will keep your little girl’s feet warm in colder weather. Great for wearing while out and about, or at home as slippers. Ideal as a gift for Christmas! Available in UK Baby Sizes 0-3 Months (UK Shoe Size 0-0 – to fit foot length 9 cm – EU Shoe Size 0-15); 6-9 Months (UK Shoe Size 0-2.5 – to fit foot length 11 cm – EU Shoe Size 15-18); 12-18 Months (UK Shoe Size 3-5.5 – to fit foot length 14 cm – EU Shoe Size 19-22). 4 pairs of fluffy knitted cosy socks with heart-shaped silicon grippers on the soles. 2 pairs with striped pattern, 1 pair with all-over spotty pattern, and 1 pair with all-over heart pattern. You receive 1 pair of each design shown. Made from 98% Polyester, 2% Elastane. Machine Washable.
